question: Which language instruction best describes the robot's trajectory shown in the image?
choices: Grab the stove with the gripper

move the black pot to the left side of the stove, pick up the jar with the orange lid from the right side of the counter and place it in-between the two pots on the stove, remove the wooden spoon from the black pot on the left and put it on the stove
Align the black pot with the stove
correct_choice: move the black pot to the left side of the stove, pick up the jar with the orange lid from the right side of the counter and place it in-between the two pots on the stove, remove the wooden spoon from the black pot on the left and put it on the stove
